stemHtml: What is the approximate composition of the dry air by volume in the troposphere?

options.a: 50% oxygen, 40% nitrogen, and the rest other gases.
options.b: 88% oxygen, 9% nitrogen, and the rest other gases.
options.c: 10% oxygen, 89% nitrogen, and the rest other gases.
options.d: 21% oxygen, 78% nitrogen, and the rest other gases.
